predictions.approach: Two milestones (threads, notifications); the threads milestone has a nested reply-nesting slice. Depth via CLAWP-064 in-document parent_ref. UNGROUNDED effort - no graph consulted.

prd.title: PRD: Collaborative comments on notes
prd.body_markdown:
## Objective
Users can comment on a note, reply to comments, and be notified when someone comments on a note they follow.

## Why
Notes are shared but feedback happens out-of-band in chat, losing the link to the note. Inline comments keep the conversation anchored.

## Constraints
- Reuse the existing notes store and auth; no new service.
- Notifications go through the existing notification bus.

## Out of scope
- Real-time presence / typing indicators.
- Rich-text / attachments in comments (plain text v1).

## Success definition
A user can post a comment, reply to it (nested), and a follower receives a notification - each independently verifiable end to end.

## Chosen approach
Milestone A: comment threads (post + nested replies). Milestone B: notifications on new comments. The reply-nesting slice (A.1) is a child of the threads milestone because it only makes sense once flat threads exist.

## Traceability
Ground consulted: codegraph unavailable on this demo corpus -> effort/risk tagged UNGROUNDED (no graph). Remediation proposed: `codegraph init -i` on the editor repo before dispatch.
Milestones: root -> A (threads) -> A.1 (reply nesting); root -> B (notifications).

leaves.title: Comment threads: post and read flat comments on a note

success_criteria.criterion: A user can post a comment on a note and all users see it on reload
success_criteria.gradeable_signal: e2e: post a comment, reload as another user, assert it renders

stop_conditions: If the notes store has no per-note child collection, STOP and surface the schema decision.

predictions.approach: Comment model keyed by note_id; panel lists + posts. UNGROUNDED effort - no graph consulted.
predictions.pre_mortem: Most likely failure: comment ordering races under concurrent posts.

leaves.title: Reply nesting: a comment can be a reply to another comment

success_criteria.criterion: A reply renders indented under its parent comment to at least 1 level
success_criteria.gradeable_signal: e2e: reply to a comment, assert the reply nests under the parent

out_of_scope: unlimited-depth threading (cap at a sane depth)
stop_conditions: If flat threads (A) are not yet posting/reading, STOP - this slice builds on A.

predictions.approach: Add parent_comment_id; render tree to a depth cap. UNGROUNDED effort - no graph consulted.
predictions.pre_mortem: Most likely failure: deep nesting blows out the panel layout.

leaves.title: Comment notifications: a follower is notified on a new comment

success_criteria.criterion: A user following a note receives a notification when someone comments
success_criteria.gradeable_signal: integration test: comment as user X, assert follower Y gets a notification event

stop_conditions: If the notification bus has no per-user fan-out, STOP and surface the integration gap.

predictions.approach: On comment create, emit a notification to note followers via the existing bus. UNGROUNDED effort - no graph consulted.
predictions.pre_mortem: Most likely failure: self-notification when the commenter follows their own note.
